what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named pitch-deck/p-01 and labels it as a SOURCE design ground-truth image.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob reference, mime image/jpeg, name, dimensions w/h 0, source design_source_material, author_session, created timestamp, and an empty links array.
The body states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-01.jpg'.
The asset is referenced by content-addressed blob URI blob://b2:cedfa3e870a59c2456de6a5e94b12013.
standouts: The image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg entry.
The blob is referenced by a content-addressed URI.
The body explicitly marks the file as a SOURCE design ground-truth.
concerns: Width and height are 0, which may indicate missing image dimension extraction.
The links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded.
The id and path values are nearly redundant with the file path.
notes: A ledger stub for a pitch-deck source image that carries addressing and provenance metadata but no extracted dimensions or relationships.
questions: Why are width and height zero for an image asset?
What does the author_session ch-3mpkjg3r represent?
Are links intended to be populated later with downstream references?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as a SOURCE design ground-truth image record; actual content is a metadata stub with no image content or dimensions, so it documents existence and provenance rather than the image itself.
intention_signals: To create a neutral, machine-readable ledger entry that locates and authenticates a source image used as ground truth for a pitch-deck design asset.
contribution: Provides a stable, content-addressed reference and provenance metadata for a pitch-deck source image, which a fused system can use to resolve and verify the asset without ranking it against other records.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata file for a design-source JPEG image named pitch-deck/p-01, including content-addressed blob reference, author session, creation timestamp, and a SOURCE design ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and ground-truth a pitch-deck source image in a channel-memory ledger for later retrieval and provenance tracking.
